spacing.title: Spacing read
spacing.body: Handlers stay wide. Cutters hold lanes without crowding the throw lane.

reset.title: Reset timing
reset.body: The reset comes one beat late. The swing lane closes before the dump is ready.

swing.title: Swing window
swing.body: Open side clears briefly at frame 42. A quicker swing would hit C1 earlier.

cutter.title: Cutter timing
cutter.body: C1 starts the cut before the handler looks. The cut is early but creates separation.

pressure.title: Defensive pressure
pressure.body: Downfield markers stay connected. No easy break-side throw shows in this clip.

drill.title: Drill suggestion
drill.body: Run dump / swing reset reps with the same spacing cue from this clip.
